cards.text:
Title: Kites in the Sky

The kites ascend gracefully, resembling colorful birds floating in the wind-swept expanse.

Title: Desiring Lightness

The narrator wishes to be petite and light, to ascend effortlessly alongside the kites.

Title: Imaginary Journey

Imagining climbing onto a kite and soaring high above, experiencing the feeling of sailing.

Title: On Paper Wings
  • Floating on paper wings with the breeze.
  • Listening to the songs sung by the wild wind.

Title: Aerial View
  • Imagining the fun of looking down from high above.
  • Witnessing the park and rooftops of the town from a bird's eye view.

Title: Elegance of the Kites

Kites dance elegantly, capturing onlookers' imaginations with their aerial movements.

Title: Wishes of the Onlookers

People gaze and yearn to be as high, sharing the adventure with the kites.

Title: Windy Songs

The kites drift while the windy gusts create melodies that enchant the otherwise silent sky.

Title: The Wish to Fly
  • The narrator dreams of elevating high, detaching from the earthly bounds.
  • A longing for the freedom associated with flight.

Title: Awe from the Ground

Those on the ground are left in awe, watching the kites and dreaming of the heights they reach.
